'''Banner Sumptor''' was an [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] soldier who planned to sabotage the wedding of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] with his compatriots, [[Chala Venan]], [[Chik Apla]], [[Iry Danta]], [[Anlys Takkar]], and [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Derran Takkar]]. However, Sumptor doubted the aim of the mission, and instead saved Skywalker's life during a bar room brawl. He was later ordered by Anlys Takkar to kill Mara Jade's dressmaker, [[Jari'kyn]]. He realized he couldn't do it and ended up betraying his companions, killing two mercenaries and helping Jari'kyn to defeat Takkar.
